creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
I'd be happy to help, but I'm confused as to how my name got attached to this.

This is the only commit I've ever made to the handbook:

r53718 | jwb | 2019-12-29 09:13:40 -0600 (Sun, 29 Dec 2019) | 11 lines
Changed paths:
   M /head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/advanced-networking/chapter.xml

Update WiFi failover example in advanced-networking.
